title: Post-graduation work permit: Field of study - Eligible CIP codes for transport - Canada.ca
content:
## Field of study: Eligible CIP codes for transport
Last updated: July 4, 2025
Check below to find out which Classification of Instructional Programs (CIP) code (opens in a new tab) in the transport category is eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP).
- Public transportation and infrastructure planning/studies CIP code: 44.0403 Your CIP code is eligible.

## Public transportation and infrastructure planning/studies
Your CIP code is eligible.
- Airframe mechanics and aircraft maintenance technology/technician CIP code: 47.0607 Your CIP code is eligible.
